hero.title: Character Model Sheet
hero.description: Create professional character model sheets with AI. Generate comprehensive character references including multi-angle views, expression sheets, and design specifications. Perfect for animators, game developers, and character designers who need consistent reference materials.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your character or upload reference

steps.title: Input your character concept
steps.description: Describe your character's appearance, style, and key features, or upload an existing character image as reference. Include details about costume, proportions, and personality.

steps.title: Select model sheet format
steps.description: Choose the reference views you need: front, back, side views, 3/4 angles, expression sheets, costume details, or full turnaround layouts.

steps.title: Generate character reference sheet
steps.description: AI creates a professional model sheet with consistent character appearance across all views, maintaining proportions, details, and style throughout.

steps.title: Download your character sheet
steps.description: Export high-resolution character model sheets ready for animation, game development, illustration projects, or production teams.

items.question: What is a Character Model Sheet?
items.answer: A character model sheet is a reference document showing a character from multiple angles with consistent proportions and details—essential for animation, games, and comics where characters must look consistent across many drawings.

items.question: What views can I generate?
items.answer: Generate front, back, left side, right side, 3/4 views, top-down, expression sheets, costume breakdowns, and any specific angle needed for your production.

items.question: Will the character be consistent across views?
items.answer: Yes. The AI maintains consistent proportions, details, costume elements, and style across all generated views—the core purpose of a model sheet.

items.question: What art styles are supported?
items.answer: Create model sheets in various styles: anime, western cartoon, realistic, stylized, chibi, game art, and custom styles based on your reference inputs.

items.question: Can I include expression sheets?
items.answer: Yes. Generate expression reference sheets showing your character displaying different emotions while maintaining consistent facial features and style.

items.question: Is this suitable for professional production?
items.answer: Absolutely. The output quality meets professional standards for animation, game development, and illustration production workflows.

items.question: Can I iterate on the design?
items.answer: Yes. Use the generated model sheet as a starting point and request variations or refinements to specific aspects of the character design.

items.question: What resolution are the output images?
items.answer: Model sheets are delivered in high resolution suitable for production work, detailed reference viewing, and print documentation.
